channel.title: 每日一书 - 学术精读
channel.description: 每天 4 张学术精读卡 (社会学/人类学/历史学/政治学)

item.title: Networks at Work: Officer Diversity, Network Segregation, and Police Misconduct
Islam at the monastery: on infinity as subtractive truth
item.description: Based on ethnographic research at Rūm Orthodox Christian monasteries in Lebanon, the article studies scenes of Islam at the monastery as they intersect with anxious public debates on, and anthropological theorizations of, sectarianism and ‘Muslim–Christian’ relations in the Mashriq. The article demonstrates that these monastics, when speaking about Islam's imbrication with Orthodox Christianity, defer the desire for mediation and thus effect truth as what is neither language nor body. What subse

item.title: The Domestic Sources of International Trust
item.description: How do states overcome mistrust? Scholars argue that costly foreign policy signals build trust. But when trust is low, such as during rivalries, states are unwilling to use these signals for fear of being cheated. We argue that domestic policies can also build trust by revealing information about a state’s likelihood of cooperating internationally when there is a correlation between domestic and international preferences. We further argue that domestic policies have a distinct advantage: the val

item.title: 2026-06-16 - 4 学科
item.category: 社会学, 人类学, 历史学, 政治学
